text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, September 02. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that tracking my weekly fitness metrics. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. That's good medical feedback. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Here is what I recommend. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Calculating some savings estimates. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Refinancing is a great leverage point. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: That's wonderful. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that i'm reviewing the scheduling portal specs for Vertex Health. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's break this down. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Staying active is key. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Understood. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Planning for future education costs. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. Refinancing is a great leverage point. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. School projects are fun. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Researching rover power systems in depth. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Got it, Mike. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
